noird_g_song_fangrui_2010: Song Fangrui (宋方睿) was a gold medalist at the 2010 NOI (中国全国信息学奥林匹克竞赛, China National Olympiad in Informatics, the 27th edition), representing 华东师大二附中. NOI gold medalists are the top-ranked high-school competitive programmers in China each year and enter the national training team, with most going on to elite Chinese universities (Tsinghua University, Peking University) for undergraduate computer science, often continuing to careers in technology research, AI, software engineering, or competitive programming infrastructure.

noird_s_xu_liangqin_2015: Xu Liangqin (徐良钦) was a silver medalist at the 2015 NOI (中国全国信息学奥林匹克竞赛, China National Olympiad in Informatics, the 32th edition), representing 广西壮族自治区阳朔县阳朔中学. NOI silver medalists rank just below the gold tier nationally among Chinese high-school competitive programmers each year, with most going on to elite Chinese universities for undergraduate computer science, often continuing to careers in technology research, AI, software engineering, or competitive programming infrastructure.
